title: hymenophyllum pumilum
intro: Hymenophyllum pumilum, also known as the dwarf fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae, which is native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum pumilum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for topical use. Hymenophyllum pumilum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or creams, making it a versatile plant for various applications.
